headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Map: See how gas prices have changed in the county where you live
headlines.description: How much gas prices have increased during the Iran war depends entirely on where you live, an NBC News analysis of average gas price data from AAA shows.

headlines.title: Howard Lutnick evasive during Epstein testimony, House Democrats say
headlines.description: Howard Lutnick said he stopped talking to Jeffrey Epstein in 2005. But a House inquiry wants to know why investigative files show otherwise.

headlines.title: Price of oil plunges and markets surge on report U.S. and Iran are near deal
headlines.description: The price of oil plunged and stocks surged after a new report said the U.S. believed it was nearing a deal to end the war with Iran.

headlines.title: Ryan Serhant Helps Boston Mom Find New Home For Her Family
headlines.description: Ryan Serhant, luxury real estate broker and star of the hit Netflix show “Owning Manhattan," takes TODAY’s Jenna Bush Hager and Sheinelle Jones on a real estate hunt to help a single mom of three named Jeyris find a new home in Boston for her growing family. See which one she picks!

headlines.title: Tips to Save Money at the Gas Pump as Prices Continue to Climb
headlines.description: The national average for gas prices inched higher to $4.54 but drivers in some states are shelling out a lot more. NBC’s Vicky Nguyen joins TODAY with ways to shave a little off what you pay at the pump. Tips include getting 10 cents off per gallon through Amazon Prime’s Fuel up Fridays at participating stations, filling up on weekdays instead of weekends, and more.

headlines.title: Rent, Buy or Fix Up? Tips for Making the Right Real Estate Move
headlines.description: Whether you’re considering buying, selling, or refinancing, NBC’s senior business correspondent Christine Romans joins TODAY with a breakdown of how to get the best value in the spring housing market if you’re looking to make a move. She shares tips for how to counter rising mortgage rates, explains which home renovations add most value in selling, and more.

headlines.title: GameStop offers to buy eBay for $56 billion
headlines.description: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen is pursuing a $56 billion takeover of eBay, hoping it will be a vehicle to compete with Amazon. NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz looks at the numbers behind the offer and talks it out with Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: Ted Turner, billionaire media mogul and CNN founder, dies at 87
headlines.description: Ted Turner, the high-flying media tycoon, entrepreneur and philanthropist who founded CNN and revolutionized American cable television, died on Wednesday, according to his private holding company.

headlines.title: Spain says it will harbor cruise ship at center of suspected hantavirus outbreak in its Canary Islands
headlines.description: The government of Spain said Tuesday that it will receive the cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak at one of its ports in the Canary Islands

headlines.title: Trump pauses effort to guide ships through Hormuz, citing progress on Iran peace deal
headlines.description: The ceasefire in the Middle East was in peril Tuesday after the U.S. and Iran traded fire and threats over President Donald Trump's new mission to force open the Strait of Hormuz.
